text:
Care Act of 2010 (ACA) changed the way 
benchmarks are calculated to improve continuity of Part D plan enrollment for LIS beneficiaries. Refer 
to the CMS Medicare Prescription Drug Benefit Manual for additional details (reference 
http://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Prescription-Drug-
Coverage/PrescriptionDrugCovContra/PartDManuals.html) 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting plan benefit package information.
